SEARCH
Package dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util

Class AnnotationNames

java.lang.Object
dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.core.util.AnnotationNames
public final class AnnotationNames extends Object
Centralised string constants for annotation class names used across the library. Using strings avoids hard compile-time dependencies on Spring / Lombok.
